service_area: Bloomington and the greater Twin Cities metro

contact.source_note: Email found on Chamber of Commerce listing; phone/contact page confirmed from public site.

pitch_angle: The company has strong trust signals and a long local history, but the mobile homepage can feel crowded and the main hero message overflows the screen. A cleaner mobile-first redesign can make the phone/estimate path and 60-year credibility easier to act on.

offer_hypothesis.maintenance: $149/month optional hosting, maintenance, uptime, and small edits

active_business_signals: Local address visible in Bloomington, MN
Messaging says roofing the Twin Cities since 1964
Service pages include roof replacement, roof installation, roof inspection, and residential shingle roofing
ux_opportunities: Mobile hero headline overflows horizontally on a 390px viewport
Hero message is long and SEO-heavy for first-screen conversion
Navigation repeats across desktop/mobile markup and feels dense
Important proof points and free inspection/estimate path can be organized more clearly
Large service-area content and FAQ depth could be structured for scanning
